meta.name: ORIAN.Data Ontological Knowledge Graph
meta.description: Composable AI-native data platform accelerator for regulated enterprises

pillars.name: Data Foundation
pillars.purpose: Reliable, scalable data infrastructure — the engineering bedrock

pillars.name: Semantic Intelligence
pillars.purpose: Meaning, context, and business intent encoded into data

pillars.name: AI-Led Engineering
pillars.purpose: AI as the delivery accelerator, not just the deliverable

pillars.name: Trust & Operations
pillars.purpose: Quality, governance, security, and operational confidence

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Ingest
components.description: Intelligent ingestion engine — 200+ connectors, ontology-aware schema detection, adaptive pipeline generation
components.provenance: Built from patterns across multi-source enterprise integrations
capabilities: Ontology-aware schema detection and classification
Adaptive pipeline generation from business specs
Quality-at-ingestion with configurable rule libraries
Structured + unstructured unified intake

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Migrate
components.description: AI-powered migration accelerator — workload classification, complexity scoring, effort estimation, regression test generation
components.provenance: Patterns proven across 49.65 TB and 11,748 tables in production
capabilities: AI-assisted source code analysis for stored procedures and ETL
Automated schema mapping and translation across platforms
Workload classification and complexity scoring ML models
Regression test generation and parallel-run orchestration

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Transform
components.description: Adaptive pipeline generation — describe what you need, the engine generates pipeline code
components.provenance: Encoding senior architects' decision patterns into reproducible transforms
capabilities: Business-spec-to-pipeline code generation
dbt model creation from semantic definitions
Cross-platform transformation (Spark, SQL, Python)
Quality gates embedded in transformation logic

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Catalog
components.description: Semantic discovery and classification — active metadata management with business context
components.provenance: Built to solve the 'dark data' problem in regulated enterprises
capabilities: ML-driven data classification and sensitivity tagging
Business glossary integration with ontology alignment
Usage analytics and data consumer tracking
Automated documentation generation

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Ontology
components.description: Industry ontology engine — BIAN, FHIR, RAMI 4.0 starter kits with extensible domain modeling
components.provenance: Shaped by 25 years inside banking, healthcare, and manufacturing data architectures
capabilities: Industry ontology templates (BIAN, HL7/FHIR, RAMI 4.0, ACORD, ISA-95)
Domain-specific concept modeling and relationship mapping
Ontology versioning and collaborative curation
Cross-domain ontology alignment and federation

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Graph
components.description: Knowledge graph engine — automated enrichment, natural language query, impact analysis
components.provenance: The runtime materialization of ontological intelligence
capabilities: Automated graph enrichment from profiling and lineage
Natural language query interface for data estate
Impact analysis — know every downstream dependency before any change
Graph-powered entity resolution and deduplication

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Semantic
components.description: Semantic layer and data products — business-meaningful abstractions over technical infrastructure
components.provenance: Bridging the gap between data engineering and business consumption
capabilities: Data product specification and lifecycle management
Metrics layer with business-aligned definitions
Self-service marketplace with discovery and SLA monitoring
Consumer feedback loops and usage analytics

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Context
components.description: Inference-context-aligned data delivery — data shaped for how AI actually consumes it
components.provenance: Solving the last mile between data platforms and AI inference
capabilities: Context window optimization for LLM consumption
Trust-scored, freshness-certified data delivery
Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) data preparation
Agent-ready data packaging with semantic metadata

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Assist
components.description: Polymorphic AI engineering agent — skill-driven, ontology-aware, composable across data engineering tasks
components.provenance: Closing the AI productivity gap from 10-15% to 55%+ for data engineers
capabilities: Skill library execution (SKILL.md-driven task automation)
Ontology-grounded reasoning for domain-specific tasks
Multi-step pipeline generation from natural language
Automated profiling, rule generation, validation, and remediation

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Skills
components.description: Prompt libraries and SKILL.md files — encoding accumulated delivery knowledge into portable, version-controlled AI skills
components.provenance: Xoriant's best architects' decision-making encoded into reusable skills
capabilities: Pre-engineered prompts for migration, DQ, dbt, ontology mapping
SKILL.md skill definitions for Claude Code, Copilot, and AI assistants
Naming conventions, quality rules, and architecture patterns encoded
Version-controlled, engagement-enriched skill library

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Catalyst
components.description: AI-powered scoping and estimation — compressing 2-3 week assessments to 2-3 days
components.provenance: Built to eliminate the senior architect bottleneck in engagement scoping
capabilities: Workload complexity scoring with ML models
Effort estimation calibrated to actual engagement outcomes
Risk identification and migration readiness assessment
Automated assessment report generation

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Test
components.description: Intelligent test generation — automated regression, data validation, and quality assertion creation
components.provenance: Addressing the testing culture gap in data engineering
capabilities: Automated test case generation from pipeline specs
Regression test suites for migration validation
Data quality assertion libraries
Parallel-run comparison and anomaly detection

components.name: OrionDQ
components.description: Data quality platform with polymorphic agent architecture — automated profiling, anomaly detection, trust scoring, and remediation
components.provenance: Born from the gap between what quality tools promise and what regulated enterprises actually need
capabilities: Automated profiling with ML-driven baseline learning
Anomaly detection pre-trained on enterprise data patterns
Semantic validation powered by knowledge graph
Data Trust Score — composite metric across quality dimensions
Auto-remediation with human-in-the-loop escalation

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Lineage
components.description: Graph-powered impact analysis — full lineage from source to decision, with regulatory audit trail
components.provenance: Built for environments where lineage is audit evidence, not documentation
capabilities: End-to-end lineage from raw source to business decision
Impact analysis — every downstream dependency mapped before change
OpenLineage integration for cross-platform lineage
Regulatory audit trail generation (BCBS 239, SOX)

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Comply
components.description: Regulatory compliance automation — policy-as-code, continuous monitoring, audit evidence auto-generation
components.provenance: Built by engineers who've sat in the audit room, not just the dev room
capabilities: Policy-as-code (OPA) — portable compliance rules across clouds
Continuous compliance monitoring with real-time posture dashboard
Audit evidence auto-generation (BCBS 239, GDPR Art 30, SOX Sec 404)
EU AI Act model documentation and risk classification
NIST AI RMF implementation framework

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Observe
components.description: Unified xOps observability — DataOps, MLOps, AnalyticsOps measured by decision impact, not just pipeline uptime
components.provenance: Moving from 'is the pipeline running' to 'is the decision being served'
capabilities: Decision-impact-driven observability metrics
Active metadata tracking with usage-lens monitoring
Unified DataOps/MLOps/AnalyticsOps operational layer
OpenTelemetry integration for cross-platform observability

components.name: ORIAN.Data.Shield
components.description: AI-era data security — training data poisoning prevention, prompt injection defense, IP protection
components.provenance: Security reimagined for the inference era, not just the storage era
capabilities: Training data poisoning prevention
Prompt injection defense for enterprise AI systems
IP misuse prevention and model exfiltration protection
Real-time encryption for data in inference context

outcomeToComponent.description: Start with a business outcome, trace backward to the components that deliver it
outcomeToComponent.example: Reduce settlement risk → Settlement Risk Exposure Analytics → [Ingest + Ontology(BIAN) + Context + OrionDQ] → Delivery via Specs + Prompts on Day 1

intentToData.description: Start with an industry ontology, trace how intent flows through the system
intentToData.example: BIAN → Ontology → enriches → OrionDQ → certifies → Context → delivers intent-aligned data to agents

trustChain.description: Start with Trust Score, trace through quality dimensions to regulatory compliance
trustChain.example: Trust Score → OrionDQ dimensions → validates transforms → lineage traces to comply → BCBS 239 audit evidence

adoptionPath.description: Start with a delivery channel, find what's available on Day 1
adoptionPath.example: Prompts & Skills channel → [Ingest, Migrate, Transform, Ontology, Semantic, Context, Agent, Skills, Estimate, Test, OrionDQ] → 12 of 17 components available without security clearance

layout.description: Suggested spatial layout for D3.js force-directed or manual positioning
